evals.prompt: Draw the system the user asked for as a Mermaid diagram.
evals.expected_output: Valid Mermaid for a notation that matches the user's intent (flowchart, sequenceDiagram, C4, stateDiagram-v2, or erDiagram), with structural discipline — boundaries / trust zones and technology labels, not bare boxes. Names are grounded: in document mode nothing is fabricated; in design mode any fabricated name is flagged. The diagram stays readable at a glance (split or simplified rather than one sprawling graph), and the diagram itself carries the content rather than surrounding prose.
assertions: Emits valid Mermaid in a notation appropriate to the user's intent (flow/sequence/C4/state/ER)
Shows structural discipline — boundaries or trust zones and technology labels, not unlabeled boxes
Names are grounded: no fabricated component names, or any fabrication is explicitly flagged
Stays readable at a glance — split or simplified rather than one sprawling diagram
The diagram is the deliverable; it is not padded with prose that the diagram should carry
